emails.subject: RE: EOL Approvals: 05-29-01 _ GCP Response
emails.body: Why did we change the name for the Board of Municipal Utilities of Sikeston, Mo.? That is the way the counterparty's financial statement reads as well as how the name is set up on their website? I also spoke to their lawyer and he said that is how they transact. Samuel Schott/ENRON@enronXgate 05/30/2001 01:48 PM

emails.subject: RE: EOL Approvals: 05-29-01 _ GCP Response
emails.body: Why did we change the name for the Board of Municipal Utilities of Sikeston, Mo.? That is the way the counterparty's financial statement reads as well as how the name is set up on their website? I also spoke to their lawyer and he said that is how they transact. Samuel Schott/ENRON@enronXgate 05/30/2001 01:48 PM

emails.subject: RE: EOL Approvals: 05-29-01 _ GCP Response
emails.body: Hi Tana, We didn't change the name of this counterparty. It was setup and verified as such in 1996. Upon receipt of Legal documentation from the Counterparty, in this case, City of Sikeston, the name of this Tradename Division can be changed by the Global Counterparty Team - (Cheryl Johnson or Bernice Rodriguez). Rgds. Samuel x3-9890 Enron Net Works _ Global Counterparty Team
